description: Agent feedback: SKILL.md is written for a human reading the table, not a scripting agent. Gaps to close: (1) bl create's stdout contract (bare task id) is undocumented; (2) --parent flag is not mentioned, leaving agents to misuse --dep or --link relates_to for hierarchy; (3) semantics of the 'epic' task type are never explained (it is a label, nothing more); (4) bl init's bootstrap behavior in a zero-commit repo is not documented (it creates its own commit, a balls/tasks state branch, and .gitignore entries); (5) no 'Scripting with bl' section exists documenting which commands print machine-parseable output and which accept --json. Add a dedicated scripting section and fill the missing pieces.
title: Document scripting contract in SKILL.md
